response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering expertise and deep Linux knowledge, this role requires native-level Japanese language proficiency (explicitly stated as a required qualification), which is absent from the resume. More critically, the position focuses on embedded network security, yet the candidate shows no specialization in security technologies, networking protocols, embedded networking systems, or related security features. Recent career trajectory has pivoted away from embedded systems toward web platforms and AI infrastructure over the past decade.
strengths: Deep Linux expertise and low-level systems programming experience with C/C++, including real-time applications
Proven software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and testing frameworks across multiple technology stacks
Some embedded systems experience with robotic arms, mobile device orchestration, and infrastructure tooling
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency (stated as required qualification) is completely absent; resume only shows English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and German (basic)
No demonstrated expertise in network security technologies, encryption, authentication systems, MACsec, 802.1X, or attack detection mechanisms

Career has shifted significantly away from embedded systems toward web development and high-level platform work; last 10 years focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and infrastructure rather than embedded networking

key_factors.factor: No security or embedded networking specialization
Strong foundational software engineering and Linux systems knowledge
